title: Mighty Smoky Uruguayan Pumpkin Empanadas
description: Earthy, crunchy empanadas with smoky pumpkin and creamy cheese, perfect for midnight cravings.

ingredients.name: Pumpkin
ingredients.notes: peeled, cubed, and roasted until tender

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat, add pumpkin cubes, and sauté for 8-10 minutes until lightly browned.
Stir in smoked paprika, cumin, salt, and pepper; cook for another 2 minutes until fragrant.
Remove from heat and let the mixture cool slightly, then fold in softened cream cheese, smoked salt, and grated Parmesan until well combined.
Place a spoonful of the pumpkin filling onto each empanada dough disc, leaving an edge.
Fold dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press edges with a fork to seal.
Brush each empanada with beaten egg to give a golden crust.
Bake for 15-18 minutes, or until the dough is puffed and golden brown.
